error_signature: Check Availability node always returns true
title: Check Availability node returns true for booked slots
symptom: The Check Availability node in n8n returns true even when the time slot is booked, leading to false triggers and multiple bookings.
applies_when: Using Google Calendar Check Availability node
Event is booked in the calendar
not_this_if: Node is not used for checking availability
root_cause: The Check Availability node may be using a different timezone than the one in which the event was created. If the node checks availability in UTC while the event is in local time, it may not recognize the booked event, resulting in incorrect availability status.
fix_steps: Check the timezone settings in n8n
Ensure the timezone of the Check Availability node matches the timezone of the booked event
Test the node again after adjusting the timezone
agent_instruction: Align the timezone settings in n8n with the timezone of your Google Calendar events.
